{"query":"Lil Tay September 2024 ICU hospitalization open-heart surgery tumor social media updates","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1150,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.eonline.com/news/1407329/lil-tay-shown-in-hospital-bed-after-open-heart-surgery-one-year-after-death-hoax","title":"Lil Tay Undergoes "Open Heart Surgery" One Year After Death Hoax","content":"More than a year after she was the target of a death hoax, Lil Tay has undergone heart surgery amid a private health battle, according to her social media account.
The teen, who rose to fame as an influencer as a child, has not been active on social media for almost a year.
In August 2023, amid a years-long absence from the public eye amid a custody battle between her parents, Angela Tian and Christopher Hope, a post announcing the deaths of both Tay and her brother Jason was shared to the rapper's Instagram.
In September 2023, the musician returned to social media to make her first on-camera appearance in five years, appearing on a live session and dropping a new music video, "Sucker 4 Green." At the time, multiple outlets reported she was 14 years old."},{"url":"https://www.complex.com/pop-culture/a/tracewilliamcowen/lil-tay-hospitalized-icu","title":"Lil Tay Account Says She's Diagnosed With a 'Life-Threatening Heart Tumor' (UPDATE)","content":"ET: Lil Tay has reportedly completed a successful open-heart surgery after being diagnosed with a heart tumor.
ET: An update on Lil Tay's "serious condition" was shared via the verified X account associated with her on Thursday evening.
"Tay has been diagnosed with a life-threatening heart tumor," reads the tweet.
A verified X account associated with Lil Tay says she is in “serious condition” in the ICU, though additional information was not immediately shared.
By Thursday, the account had shared photos of a hospital setting, adding that the teen social media personality “is currently in the ICU in serious condition.” The same X account also called out a community note that had been applied to a previous tweet, noting that Tay’s health incident was “life-threatening.” The community note in question, as seen below, had attempted to call the claims into question by referencing a prior death hoax.
Last August, it was purported via Tay’s IG account that both she and her brother had died.
Everything you need to know about Lil Tay’s bizarre “bad news” IG post, the abuse allegations against her father Chris Hope, GoFundMe account, & more."},{"url":"https://www.hotnewhiphop.com/842494-lil-tay-heart-surgery-viral-news","title":"Lil Tay Undergoes Open-Heart Surgery For “Life-Threatening” Tumor","content":"The person running the account shared that she was in the ICU for a "life-threatening" health issue, which they later revealed to be a heart tumor.
Now, however, it's been revealed that she recently had open heart surgery.
"We are overjoyed to share that Tay’s open-heart surgery was a great success!
Share your thoughts in the comments section down below and keep an eye on HNHH for more updates.
